card.name: Sea of Tranquility
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Genbu Ravine
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Wonderful Heaven
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Land of the Backdoor
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Probability Space Hypervessel
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Now, Until Your Final Breath
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile each noncommander creature you control until this card leaves the battlefield. Commander creatures you control get +5/+5 and have vigilance, ward {5}, and "This creature can block any number of creatures each combat."

card.name: Apparitions Stalk the Night
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice. Create a 2/2 black Nightstalker creature token.

card.name: The White Rabbit's Trick
card.text: Until end of turn, target attacking creature you control can't be blocked except by target untapped creature defending player controls.

card.name: The Purest Sky and Sea
card.text: Search your library for a card with a basic land type, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Ancient Sanctuary
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Silent Sinner in Blue
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token. II — Exile up to two target creatures you control until this Saga leaves the battlefield. III — Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying and a Food token.

card.name: Curiosities of Lotus Asia
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Mill four cards, then you may return an artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. II — Investigate. III — You may sacrifice an artifact. When you do, scry X, where X is its mana value, then draw a card.

card.name: Forbidden Scrollery
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 black and red Youkai creature tokens. II — Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. III — Return up to one target Human creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. It's no longer a Human.

card.name: Visionary Fairies in Shrine
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. II — Create two Treasure tokens. III — Sacrifice any number of artifacts, then amass Faeries X, where X is the number of artifacts sacrificed this way.

card.name: Wild and Horned Hermit
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for a nonlegendary creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. II — Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature. III — Until end of turn, target creature you control must be blocked if able and can't be blocked by more than one creature.

card.name: Magic is All About Power
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {2} more to cast. If an instant or sorcery spell you control would deal damage, it deals double that damage instead.

card.name: Hellfire Mantle
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Netherworld Gates
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Garden of the Sun
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Youkai Mountain
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Immemorial Marketeer
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile your hand until this card leaves the battlefield. Whenever a commander you control deals combat damage to an opponent, you may cast a card exiled with this enchantment without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Hidden Star in All Seasons
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile each nonbasic land you control until this card leaves the battlefield. Commanders you cast cost {2} less to cast for each card exiled with this enchantment.

card.name: Solar Sect of Mystic Wisdom
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile the top fifteen cards of your library. Sacrifice a commander: You may cast any number of the exiled cards with total mana value X or less without paying their mana costs, where X is the mana value of the sacrificed commander.

card.name: Grave of Being
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile your graveyard. Commander creatures you control have flying as long as one of the exiled cards has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, dethrone, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, protection, prowess, reach, trample, vigilance, and ward.

card.name: The Gensokyo Chronicle
card.text: Instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard have flashback {2}{U}. (You may cast it from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.) Creature cards in your graveyard have encore {2}{U}. (Exile it and pay its encore cost: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.) The Gensokyo Chronicle can be your commander.

card.name: Cheating Detective Satori
card.text: Menace Mind Reader — When Satori enters, for each opponent, that player reveals their hand and you investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a Clue: Exile target card from an opponent's graveyard. Until end of turn, you may cast that card and mana of any type may be spent to cast it.

card.name: Aya, Reporter of Fantasy
card.text: Flash Flying, haste Candid Shot — When Aya enters, look at target player's hand and choose a card in it. That player reveals that card, and Aya deals damage to them equal to its mana value. {3}{U}{R}: Return Aya to her owner's hand.

card.name: Mizuchi, Traitor to Humanity
card.text: Lifelink When Mizuchi enters, each player creates a 1/1 black and red Youkai creature token. Casualty of the Great Barrier — When Mizuchi dies, each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature of their choice. Each player who can't discards a card.

card.name: Reimu, Spirits' Grudge
card.text: Ward—Pay 5 life. Reimu enters with an additional +1/+1 counter for each other Spirit you control and each Spirit in your graveyard. Whenever a creature dealt damage by Reimu this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on her, then each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Mysterious Medicine Merchant
card.text: When Mysterious Medicine Merchant enters, each other creature you control gains persist until end of turn. (When it dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.) Discard a card: Remove all counters from target creature you control.

card.name: Kappa Tinkerers
card.text: Artifacts and other Artificers you control have "{4}, {T}: Draw a card."

card.name: Choujuu Gigaku
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell during each opponent's turn, goad up to three target creatures that player controls. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Remote-Work Zashiki-Warashi
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 2 life. Reinforce 1—{W} ({W}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.) Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Helpful Hofgoblin
card.text: When this creature enters, untap another target creature you control. Until end of turn, it gets +1/+1 and gains vigilance and trample.

card.name: Lord Tenma's Command
card.text: Choose two — • Target player creates two 1/1 white Bird Youkai creature tokens with flying and vigilance. • Airbend target creature. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.) • Lord Tenma's Command deals 5 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. • Two target players each draw a card.

card.name: Those Were Good Pills
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Thirst for Companionship
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a legendary card.

card.name: Reduce to Vapor
card.text: Exile target creature or enchantment. You lose 3 life.

card.name: Fairy Menace
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Twin Spark
card.text: (You may cast a legendary instant only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Target creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn. It deals X damage to up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Raiko, Guest Drummer
card.text: Double strike Bards you control have "Whenever an ability of this creature triggers, you may copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. Do this only once each turn."

card.name: Aunn, Temple Helper
card.text: When Aunn enters, return up to one target God you control or God card in your graveyard to its owner's hand. Whenever a God enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Mamizou, Ever Watching
card.text: When Mamizou enters, for each player, choose up to one other nonland permanent they control. Return the chosen permanents to their owner's hands. Whenever you cast a spell, create a 1/1 black and red Youkai creature token.

card.name: Enenra
card.text: When this creature enters, each player loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.

card.name: Great Fairies
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, amass Faeries 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Faerie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Faerie Army creature token first.) Other Faeries you control have vigilance.

card.name: Kitsune Impostor
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may have it become a copy of another target creature you control until end of turn, except it's still a 3/2 Fox Youkai and isn't legendary.

card.name: A Little Sin
card.text: Flying Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Magician's Companion
card.text: Wizards you cast cost {1} less to cast. Wizards you control have "Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast."

card.name: Shadow Mirror
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, any number of target players each mill five cards. Warp {1}{UB} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Spirit Mirror
card.text: Flying You have ward {5}. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {5}.)

card.name: Spirit of the Hakurei Relic
card.text: Orbs, Clerics, and Gods you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Tanuki Impostor
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell during an opponent's turn, untap this creature. It gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: TORIFUNE Monstrosity
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, this creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Tenshi, Earthbound
card.text: Basic lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Artifact tokens you control have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 4 life."

card.name: A Discerning Customer
card.text: In that case, I'll be blunt — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token. Where did you get this third-rate swill? — Whenever you sacrifice a Food, each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Whitewater Champions
card.text: When Whitewater Champions enter, target nonbasic land becomes an Island for as long as you control this creature. Tap a creature you control with 1 power: Until end of turn, Whitewater Champions can't be blocked.

card.name: Personalized Fortune Slip
card.text: When this artifact enters, choose a legendary creature card name. Spells you cast with the chosen name cost {1} less to cast. Creatures you control with the chosen name get +1/+1.

card.name: Roukanken and Hakurouken
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2. As long as equipped creature is attacking, it has double strike. Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage, draw a card. Equip {4}

card.name: Iron Rings of Moriya
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has vigilance and menace. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.) Equip God {0} ({0}: Attach to target God creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Bird Youkai AKU
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Spirit AKU
card.text: Flying

card.name: Food AKU
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Clue AKU
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Copy AKU
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.

card.name: Oni of the Night Parade
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature enters or deals combat damage to an opponent, up to one Human you control becomes a Deserter in addition to its other types. Create two 1/1 red and black Youkai creature tokens. Deserters you control get +2/+2 and have indestructible.

card.name: Stone Cherry
card.text: You may exile a creature card from your graveyard instead of paying this spell's mana cost. When this artifact enters, scry 1, then put a +1/+1 counter on up to one creature you control.

card.name: Treasure AKU
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
